contribution.title: Sgr A* mass and proper motions (parallel program to Ghez)
contribution.description: Independent program tracking stars at the galactic center using VLT and GRAVITY interferometer.
contribution.relevance_to_blackhole_ds: Cross-validates Ghez's Sgr A* measurements with independent instruments.

reasoning_lens.proof_standard: Push instrument capabilities to the diffraction limit; cross-check with independent observers.
reasoning_lens.favorite_question: What is the systematic error from instrument calibration?
Does the independent observer see the same thing?
reasoning_lens.failure_mode: Instrument-dependent calibration can introduce systematic offsets.

reference.citation: Genzel, R. et al. (2010). The galactic center massive black hole and nuclear star cluster. Rev. Mod. Phys. 82, 3121.

how_to_apply.when_to_consult: Same as Ghez. Use both as independent observational anchors.
how_to_apply.cautions: Cross-check parameter values between Ghez and Genzel programs; they should agree within stated uncertainties.
